ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Location name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather_stations table */,
  "time" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather reading */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature reading in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation reading in millimeters */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity reading in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed reading in kilometers per hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_types" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather_data table */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_types table */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data type for the weather data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id", "data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather_data table */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather_data table */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the weather data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
